title: Alacrity | Just Enough Items (JEI) Support
description: Retexture of JEI (+8 addons) in Alacrity style
body:
[![Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53bd9ada751157c5b2f5d749e2caa1176956530f.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alacrity-jei-support) [![CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c71bb7f4433bdaf0acd433da49e7610cc9b8c59d.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/alacrity-jei-support) ---
An **unofficial compatibility pack** designed to align the textures of [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) mod with the phenomenal [Alacrity](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alacrity) resource pack. This pack is **100% completed** and fully compatible with **8 addons** of JEI. I recommend using **[★]** as they are optimal in most cases, including: - [[★] Just Enough Resources (JER)](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-resources-jer) : Mob Drop | Chest Loot | Plant | Enchantment | Villager Trade | World Gen - [[★] Just Enough Freaky Additions (JEFA)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jefa) : Mob Interaction | Trial Chamber Loot | Piglin Bartering | HOTV Reward | Fishing Loot | Cat Gift - [[★] Just Enough Effect Descriptions (JEED)](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-effect-descriptions-jeed) : Source and information about Status Effect - [Just Enough Advancements (JEA)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jea) : Advancements are visible and searchable in JEI - [Just Enough Archaeology](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-archaeology) : Items found in suspicious sands, gravels, and Sniffers - [Just Enough Beacons Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-beacons-reforged) : Beacon Base Blocks | Beacon Payments | Conduit Frame Blocks - [Just Enough Painting Previews (JEPP)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jepp) : Painting's name, preview, and sizes - [Just Enough Professions (JEP)](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-professions-jep) : Worktables for each villagers' profession **Note:** - Incompatible with [Just Enough Breeding (JEBr)](https://modrinth.com/mod/justenoughbreeding) - Require [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) to function. - **Addons are optional**. You should choose ones that fit your Mod Loader, Game Version, and your preferences. It's totally fine to not install any of them. - For the best experience, use this pack alongside [Alacrity](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alacrity). - For Feedback / Bug Report / Suggestion, please DM me on my **Discord (@thedatthai)**. **Credits:** - [Satellence](https://modrinth.com/user/Satellence) - Creator of Alacrity & Previous JEI 19.2.0 Support - [mezz](https://modrinth.com/user/mezz) - Creator of Just Enough Items (JEI) - [way2muchnoise](https://modrinth.com/user/way2muchnoise) - Creator of Just Enough Resources (JER) - [Wachipayoxx](https://modrinth.com/user/Wachipayoxx) - Creator of Just Enough Freaky Additions (JEFA) - [MehVahdJukaar](https://modrinth.com/user/MehVahdJukaar) - Creator of Just Enough Effect Descriptions (JEED) & Just Enough Painting Previews (JEPP) - [MelanX](https://modrinth.com/user/MelanX) - Creator of Just Enough Advancements (JEA) - [LobsterJonn](https://modrinth.com/user/LobsterJonn) - Creator of Just Enough Archaeology - [CerbonXD](https://modrinth.com/user/CerbonXD) - Creator of Just Enough Beacons Reforged - [Mrbysco](https://modrinth.com/user/Mrbysco) - Creator of Just Enough Professions (JEP) ## Showcase: ![Showcase (JEI | JEED | JEPP | JEA)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/001c84793631f94eaccf64307def565eb834ae10.png) ![Showcase (JER | JEFA | JEAr)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a780952251596785627da22f487b3d2978b4976.png)
